name: io.github.rendleyhq/rendley-mcp
description: Create videos with prompts, and use Rendley’s video editor to adjust anything you need.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Provide your Rendley API key, or skip it if your client supports OAuth.

rendley_api_key.description: Learn how to create an API key here: https://docs.rendley.com/mcp/authentication
